text: I feel a peculiar mix of curiosity and alienation here. The purple glow and empty room beyond the glass evoke a sense of hushed anticipation, as if something is about to happen or has just happened. The "R + D" wall hints at innovation and exploration, yet the dim lighting and sterile atmosphere make it feel almost secretive. Am I witnessing the calm before a creative storm? Or am I merely wandering through the empty shell of possibility? There is beauty in this tension between potential and vacancy.
